plan.title: W920 Frontier Fix-List — prioritized, grouped by surface
plan.method: Synthesized from 9 per-surface frontier scans + per-surface completeness audits + standalone refutation notes under audit/w920/. Effort/impact reflect adjudicated verdicts and refutations where they revised the raw finding. Read-only on product code; this is a plan, not a patch.

legend.impact: critical > high > medium > low (business/correctness leverage, adjusted for kolm's actual positioning)
legend.effort_days: engineering-days, adjusted to verdict where the verifier revised it
legend.depends_on: must land first (by item title or phase)

global_notes: Two themes dominate: (1) build-but-unwired modules — the biggest wins are integration, not invention (confidence-router W807, multi_lora.py, eagle3.py, disagg.py, distill-preference miner without trainer, adversarial-prompts classifier, ks-sparkline, account-shell precedent). (2) source-of-truth drift — route manifest/OpenAPI stale, two redaction surfaces, two docker/k8s emitters, two lifecycle transition tables, gate-name list in 3 places, pricing tiers in 3 places.

Three live correctness/compliance bugs leak silently: gateway output redaction never reaches the client; gateway cost_usd defaults to $0 on estimator failure; fallback_reason/route_decision enum drift can throw mid-call and structurally zeroes drift+cost signals.
Ship-gate is RED on the current tree (51/52) and default release:verify FAILS — three test-only fixes unblock the entire gate.

REFUTED / already-present (do NOT build): CLI-verb behavioral smoke tests (110/665 files already do this); willArtifactFit reimplementation (the real gate is forge-fit.js and is shipped; willArtifactFit is dead code — delete it); witness-cosign anchoring (auditor-attestation.js + sigstore.js already deliver the buyer outcome). Unsloth/Liger fast path is mostly shipped (trainer_real.py) — residual is a packaging line + sample-packing only.

DOWNGRADED by verdict: gateway semantic cache and prompt-injection wiring impact tempered for kolm's distill-first positioning; RouteLLM learned router high->medium (W807 entropy splice already captures much of the lever); social-proof critical->medium (no named customers, anonymization policy forbids the proposed remedy).

top_leverage.title: Unblock the RED ship-gate (wave214 slice + wave526 gate-count + provenance file)
top_leverage.why: Every '52/52 green' claim is currently false; three test-only edits with zero product risk restore a truthful ship gate and turn the existing 665 tests back into a working net.

top_leverage.title: Apply output redaction to the client response at /v1/gateway/dispatch
top_leverage.why: redact_all/redact_captures customers receive un-redacted PII/PHI while the signed receipt claims redaction_applied — a HIPAA-grade leak on the flagship route. Few-line fix with an in-repo reference.

top_leverage.title: Regenerate stale route manifest + OpenAPI + wire a --check drift gate
top_leverage.why: 55 shipped live routes / 9 groups (entire no-code wizard, fleet, autopilot data-engine) are absent from the public contract. 15-min regen is the root cause of 4 failing audit checks; the --check gate stops it recurring forever.

top_leverage.title: Make no-code Compile produce a REAL signed .kolm (kill the 22-event stub)
top_leverage.why: The flagship no-code flow is UI-complete but delivers a fake artifact whose slug 404s; everything downstream (artifacts, verify, receipts) is already real, so a real job lights up the whole cockpit.

top_leverage.title: Wire multi-LoRA serving (one base, N adapters) into serve.py + CLI + HTTP
top_leverage.why: The single biggest serving economic differentiator (S-LoRA/Punica) is implemented in multi_lora.py but unreachable; kolm distills LoRA as a first-class output but can only serve one at a time — value leaks at the serve boundary.

top_leverage.title: Coerce fallback_reason at the receipt boundary + fix frontier_fallback dead branches
top_leverage.why: A logging-field enum can throw and abort a live gateway call; separately the drift detector's headline signal and cost-report fallback bucket are structurally zeroed on real data. Few lines, two operator-facing outputs.

top_leverage.title: Add logit-level KD loss (KL / DistiLLM-2) — the actual distillation objective
top_leverage.why: kolm markets 'distillation' but both trainers do plain SFT on teacher strings; the logit/SKL objective is what makes the K-score T-axis defensible and differentiates from generic SFT platforms.

top_leverage.title: Anytime-valid A/B gate (mSPRT) + retention guard on the re-distill loop
top_leverage.why: The autopilot re-peeks a fixed-sample t-test every tick (invalid, inflates false promotes/rollbacks) and retrains every tick with no catastrophic-forgetting guard — the two correctness holes in the autonomous core, both buildable from primitives already in-repo.

items.title: Fix brittle wave214 source-slice (ship-gate #32 RED)
items.change: Widen the 2000-char slice from cmdDistill to ~3500 OR slice to the next top-level async function boundary so the --from-captures assertion tracks the whole body. TEST-ONLY; product code intact.

items.change: Add 'ship-gate' to wave526 allGates (12->13); add ship-gate/control-files/claim-verify to wave529 ALL_GATES. Best fix: export a frozen GATE_NAMES from release-verify.cjs and have both tests assert against it.

items.depends_on: Fix brittle wave214 source-slice (ship-gate #32 RED)

items.change: Track skipped_as_pass alongside passed/failed; print in JSON + human summary; add KOLM_SHIP_GATE_STRICT to treat env-skip as non-green on the release box that has the deps.

items.change: Add node --experimental-test-coverage with function/branch thresholds to test-suite.yml; measure reality, set floor ~5% below, ratchet quarterly; emit lcov. 66/501 src modules have zero test reference.

items.change: curate/augment/evaluate/feedback contract + invariant tests (dedup+filter, provenance preserved, K-score+calibration fields, low-confidence->next compile set).

items.title: Perf gates: delta-vs-baseline, not single fixed 500ms ceiling
items.change: Persist data/perf-baseline.json (median+p95); fail on +25% regression OR absolute ceiling, whichever trips first.

items.title: Mutation testing (StrykerJS) nightly on core gate/verify modules
items.change: Stryker command-runner scoped to gateway-router/gateway-receipt/runtime-passport/data-evaluate; nightly; ratchet a mutation-score floor to surface assertion-light (source-string) tests.

items.title: Same-revision flip detection (flaky-test signal, not auto-retry)
items.change: Nightly job runs suite twice on same commit, diffs pass/fail sets, logs flips to a quarantine artifact. Detection only — no blanket retry (would hide the state-leak bugs MEMORY tracks).

items.title: Apply output redaction to client response at /v1/gateway/dispatch (BUG)
items.change: When outputScan.action==='redact', rewrite result.json assistant content (OpenAI choices[0].message.content + Anthropic content[].text) to outputScan.output_text before the spread at router.js:6556, and feed outputScan.output_text into the SSE chunker at 6471. For redact_captures, persist only redacted text to the observation row (note: capture row at 6400-6420 also currently keeps raw). Reference impl: wrapper-cli.js:933-940. Add route-level test (not CLI) asserting SSN masked in JSON+SSE.

items.title: Fix silent $0 cost on estimator failure (BUG)
items.change: Replace the try/catch-default-0 (router.js:6373-6383) with estimator_status: ok|estimator_unavailable|unknown_model; set cost_usd=null (not 0) on failure; test unknown model -> estimator_status:'unknown_model' not misleading $0.

items.title: Wire prompt-injection guardrail into the dispatch input path (GAP)
items.change: After the PII block (router.js:6258) optionally call the existing runtime-sanitizer.sanitizeInput / classifyPromptAdversarial; namespace.injection_mode='block' -> 400 with evidence spans; stamp injection_classes/score. Keep heuristic as zero-dep default, pluggable for Prompt-Guard-2 later. Note: regex detector is table-stakes-but-weak; add a false-positive escape valve; receipt stamping is cheaper as a non-signed top-level field than in the signed canonical schema.

items.title: Exact-hash L0 cache stage on the dispatch path (FRONTIER, quick slice)
items.change: Add a per-namespace exact-hash lookup (reuse cache.js cacheKey on canonical messages) between route-select and chain-dispatch; on hit build a normal signed receipt with route_decision:'cache', cost_usd:0, cache_hit:true. Zero false positives; default-on safe.

items.title: Semantic (embedding) cache stage, opt-in (FRONTIER)
items.change: Stage 2: embed prompt (reuse /v1/embeddings or local MiniLM), per-namespace NN store, accept hit only cosine>0.85 (override per namespace), default OFF with documented false-positive caveat. Impact tempered: real cost lever but secondary to kolm's distill-first thesis.
items.depends_on: Exact-hash L0 cache stage on the dispatch path (FRONTIER, quick slice)

items.title: Emit standard gen_ai.* OTel semconv alongside kolm.* (UPGRADE)
items.change: Create an inference span in the dispatch handler (currently emits no OTel span — only recordMetricEvent) and set gen_ai.system/request.model/response.model/usage.input_tokens/output_tokens/operation.name + gen_ai.client.* metrics. Keep kolm.* additive. cache_read.input_tokens gated on caching; time_to_first_token gated on real streaming.

items.title: Conditional/metadata routing (plan/region/header/A-B) (GAP)
items.change: Ordered {when:{plan,region,header_match,injection_flagged},then:<chain>} rules evaluated before buildChainFromNamespace; reuse plan in scope at 6144 + region header; stamp matched rule_id in receipt. Highest-value slice: wire the existing ab-router.pickVariant into dispatch for safe model migration.

Needs a Python/ONNX runtime + fail-open decision + F1 validation.

items.title: Weighted load-balancing / multi-key rotation (GAP)

Impact downgraded to low: kolm's distill-first thesis structurally moves traffic OFF the frontier provider, BYOC is single-key, and 429-backoff already mitigates.

items.title: FP8 KV-cache + prefix-cache + lora + spec parity between serve and deploy configs (BUG)
items.change: generateVllmConfig hard-codes kv_cache_dtype:'auto' and omits prefix-cache/lora/spec, so a model run via kolm serve gets FP8 KV but the SAME model deployed via the generated config silently does not. Emit kv_cache_dtype (fp8 on Hopper+/Blackwell), enable_prefix_caching, enable_lora+lora_modules, speculative_config; extract a shared spec or cross-test asserting serve/deploy match.

items.change: fs.existsSync(ap) in cmdServe -> EXIT.NOT_FOUND; replace buildCommand /bin/false with {ok:false,error:'runtime_not_wired',runtime,hint} (opaque ENOENT on Windows today); resolve exllamav2 same-file contradiction (add to KNOWN_RUNTIMES+buildCommand or remove from RUNTIME_SELECTION).

items.title: Coerce fallback_reason at the receipt boundary (latent P0 BUG)
items.change: dispatchWithFallback emits 'empty_chain' and selectRoute emits 'low_confidence_prior' — both outside FALLBACK_REASONS, so validateReceipt throws receipt_invalid and aborts the live call. Coerce unknown->null (or widen the enum) AND make buildAndSignReceipt coerce-with-note instead of throwing, so a logging-field bug can never take down a served request.

items.title: Fix frontier_fallback dead branches in drift + cost-displacement (BUG)
items.change: route_decision can only be local|frontier, but drift fallback_rate_delta and cost-displacement bucket key on 'frontier_fallback' -> structurally ~0 on real data. Recount fallbacks as route_decision==='frontier' AND fallback_reason!=null (already on the row); update r7/r8 fixtures to the real persisted shape.

items.title: Reconcile the two divergent lifecycle transition tables (BUG)
items.change: Promote TRANSITIONS (fuller R-2 ladder) to canonical, express VALID_TRANSITIONS as a derived view; both transition() entry points validate against the same map; test asserts identical accepted moves from every state.

items.title: Wire lifecycle revoke/supersede side-effects to a durable subscriber (GAP)
items.change: Route blockPulls/alertDeployments/linkSuccessor through a durable dispatcher: audit_events row, deployment alert via drift-alert ladder, persist successor link on lifecycle.json (survives restart); keep in-memory _sideEffectLog as a test seam only.

items.title: Fix RFC 6962 Merkle inclusion-proof verifier (BUG)
items.change: Replace the hand-rolled walk with canonical RFC 9162 verify_inclusion; compare roots with a plain length-checked timingSafeEqual (no alloc/fill/slice truncation); add RFC + live-Rekor test vectors. Must be correct before live-receipt anchoring ships.

items.title: Transparency-log anchor PER-CALL gateway receipts (UPGRADE)
items.change: Off-hot-path async batch-submit receipt digests to a configurable/self-hostable Rekor v2 (KOLM_SIGSTORE_REKOR_URL); store {logIndex,inclusionProof,integratedTime} on the observation row; surface from /v1/verify/:id; default dry-run/offline. Upgrades 'we signed it' to 'a log witnessed it at T'.
items.depends_on: Fix RFC 6962 Merkle inclusion-proof verifier (BUG)

items.title: KMS/HSM-backed signing (UPGRADE)
items.change: Signer interface in ed25519.js with pluggable backends (PEM default, KMS sign, Vault transit); stamp signing_key_id with KMS key version; emit KEY_ROTATED audit event on bump; keep public-key bytes in the receipt so offline verify is unchanged. Answers the security-review 'where does the key live'.

items.title: RFC 8785 (JCS) canonicalization for the signed payload (UPGRADE)
items.change: Replace bespoke fixed-order JSON.stringify with RFC 8785 JCS (lexicographic sort + ECMAScript number serialization); pin cost_usd to integer micro-USD; add a cross-language conformance fixture (sign Node, verify Rust SDK) to release-verify. Makes offline verify genuinely portable.

items.title: PSI / MMD / ADWIN standard drift statistics (UPGRADE)
items.change: Add PSI first-class (>0.2 warn, >0.25 alert), MMD kernel two-sample when real embeddings available, ADWIN for streaming series; keep SPC default for thin baselines. 'PSI and MMD' is the answer a model-risk reviewer expects.

items.title: in-toto v1 / SLSA provenance envelope for .kolm artifacts (FRONTIER)
items.change: Wrap the existing signed payload in an in-toto v1 Statement + SLSA Provenance predicate (subject digests, materials from distill-provenance, builder.id) signed as DSSE with the same Ed25519 key; lets cosign verify-attestation/kyverno/conftest consume kolm artifacts natively.

items.title: OSCAL assessment-results export from the assurance case (FRONTIER)
items.change: Map assurance-case claims+controls into an OSCAL assessment-results doc (observations carry receipt_id/evidence_id) + component-definition; reuse V2_DEFAULT_CONTROL_ROWS. Populates OSCAL with cryptographically verifiable evidence vs self-attestation.

items.title: REFUTED: witness-cosigned shared receipt anchoring
items.change: MOSTLY ALREADY PRESENT. auditor-attestation.js (W166) delivers independent third-party cosign with a distinct-fingerprint check; sigstore.js supports self-hosted/public Rekor; HMAC-is-internal-only is documented + test-enforced (wave493). Only sliver missing is checkpoint-witness-cosignature (~1.5-2d, frontier-purity, no procurement demand).

items.title: Add logit-level KD loss (KL / DistiLLM-2 SKL+SRKL) (GAP)
items.change: KOLM_DISTILL_LOSS env (seqkd|kl|skl|distillm2) read by a custom Trainer.compute_loss adding token-level KL(teacher||student) on top of SFT CE; capture teacher logprobs in pairs jsonl where the vendor supports it (fall back to seqkd with an honest manifest note); record loss_type + components_hash. The actual distillation objective is currently absent — both trainers do plain SFT on teacher strings.

items.title: Wire DoRA + rsLoRA + PiSSA LoRA variants (UPGRADE)
items.change: --lora-variant {lora,dora,rslora,pissa} threaded to LoraConfig kwargs (use_dora/use_rslora/init_lora_weights); default 'lora'. peft 0.19.1 on the box supports all three. NOTE: DoRA/rsLoRA are true one-liners but PiSSA needs SVD init + convert_pissa_to_lora on save; lora_variants.py exists but is orphaned (imported by nothing) and lacks PiSSA. Impact tempered: gains compress at r=16-64.

items.title: Real preference optimization (SimPO/ORPO/KTO) trainer (GAP)
items.change: workers/distill/scripts/train_preference.py wrapping TRL ORPOTrainer (no ref model)/KTOTrainer (consumes existing toKtoRows)/CPOTrainer(loss_type='simpo'); default $KOLM_PREFERENCE_TRAINER to this instead of erroring. kolm already mines disagreement pairs (T2.3, 22/22) but ships no trainer.

items.title: Standard Arena-correlated eval harness (Arena-Hard-Auto + AlpacaEval2-LC + IFEval) (GAP)
items.change: NOTE: apps/eval/packs.py + judge.py ALREADY ship real ArenaHard/AlpacaEval loaders + bias-corrected pairwise judge but are ORPHANED (no runner/CLI/route). Net-new = IFEval programmatic checker + AlpacaEval2 length-control + a runner verb bridging Python eval to kolm bench compare. Hardens the 'beats Claude/GPT-4o-mini' headline for X04.

items.title: GRPO / reinforcement fine-tuning with reward functions (FRONTIER)
items.change: src/distill-grpo.js + workers/distill/scripts/train_grpo.py via TRL GRPOTrainer; reward funcs from existing scoreCandidateLocal + deterministic verifiers; recipe reward_functions:[]; SFT-warmup->GRPO template. Predibase's headline wedge; matches kolm's verifiable-outcome narrow framing.
items.depends_on: Real preference optimization (SimPO/ORPO/KTO) trainer (GAP)

items.title: Model merging (TIES/DARE/SLERP) via mergekit (FRONTIER)
items.change: src/model-merge.js + workers/distill/scripts/merge_adapters.py shelling mergekit (optional dep, honest no-tool envelope); kolm merge --method ties --models a,b,c; adapter-level TIES/DARE first; record merge_method + source_adapter_hashes. 'Combine your distilled experts' fits the per-skill recipe model + artifact-lineage.

items.title: Magpie self-synthesis AUGMENT generator (FRONTIER)
items.change: src/synth-magpie.js: feed a chat-templated instruct model only the pre-query prefix to self-synthesize instructions, then complete responses (no seed data); pipe into data-curate filters; Evol-Instruct/persona as recipe knobs; gate behind KOLM_TEACHER_BASE_URL, cost-preview before spend. Bootstraps the no-data persona.

items.title: Make full-ft honest via GaLore + exercise FSDP path (UPGRADE)
items.change: full-ft is in the enum but train_lora.py unconditionally calls get_peft_model -> silently degrades to LoRA. Either add a real full-ft branch + --optim galore_adamw + optim_target_modules (full-rank at LoRA-ish VRAM), or drop full-ft from the enum. Impact low: studio docs already scope full-ft to <1B (fits a 5090 without GaLore); FSDP smoke needs multi-GPU.

items.title: Embedding SemDedup + data-map influence ranking in curation (UPGRADE)
items.change: Make the python dedup embedder path default (MiniLM cosine-cluster SemDedup), ngram as honest fallback; add a LESS-approx data-map (gradient-similarity to a small val target) surfacing high-influence vs redundant tiers; flag under-represented clusters for AUGMENT. (Overlaps the data-engine SemDeDup item — coordinate.)

items.title: Residual: Unsloth/Liger fast path (mostly already shipped)
items.change: MOSTLY PRESENT — trainer_real.py uses Unsloth FastLanguageModel + _maybe_apply_liger() (KOLM_USE_LIGER=1) + manifest stamping; workers/distill wires --backend {auto,hf,unsloth}. Residual ~0.5-1d: declare liger-kernel in pyproject [gpu] + workers/distill requires, add sample-packing (packing=True), optional kolm distill --backend unsloth doctor gate.

items.title: Fix distill.mjs install hint for non-existent requirements.txt (BUG)
items.change: distill.mjs:671 prints 'pip install -r requirements.txt' but no such file exists under workers/distill/; either create the file from the real inline dep list (lines 454/771) or change the hint to the actual install command.

items.title: Anytime-valid A/B gate (mSPRT) for continuous monitoring (BUG)
items.change: The autopilot re-peeks a fixed-sample Welch t-test (stat-sig.js gate, DEFAULT_ALPHA=0.05) every tick -> type-I error compounds well above 5%, so it can auto-promote/rollback on noise. Add anytimeValidGate (mSPRT / normal-mixture confidence sequence) preferred when the caller is the autopilot; keep welchT for one-shot human analyses. Same incomplete-beta machinery already in stat-sig.js.

items.title: Catastrophic-forgetting retention guard + replay on the re-distill loop (GAP)
items.change: (1) carry a small replay buffer of prior promoted-round pairs (SSR self-synthesized rehearsal) into each candidate set; (2) add a frozen RETENTION holdout (prior round's eval) and make compareAndDecide/deploy guardrail fail-closed if retention K drops > epsilon, not just live regression-class count. Makes the loop monotone-or-hold.

items.title: Split-conformal prediction interval for predictKScore (UPGRADE)
items.change: Once backfillFromRuns has a few dozen (features->observed K) rows, hold out a calibration split, compute the residual quantile at 1-alpha, return [pred-q,pred+q] with real marginal coverage; fall back to the heuristic band below the floor (same heuristic->learned flip seam). Replaces the admittedly-fabricated band the compile/deploy gates ride.

items.title: Thompson-sampling bandit traffic allocation (FRONTIER)
items.change: Optional bandit mode in the W777 router: Beta/Gaussian-on-kscore posterior per arm from recordOutcome, sample-and-route argmax; keep deterministic 50/50 as sticky default behind a per-test flag (existing 21 tests unaffected); epsilon floor so an unlucky arm isn't starved. Posterior also gives the guardrail a cleaner P(B best) than a peeked p-value.
items.depends_on: Anytime-valid A/B gate (mSPRT) for continuous monitoring (BUG)

items.title: Power-law learning-curve extrapolation for ingest budgeting (FRONTIER)
items.change: Fit per-namespace K(n)=K_inf - a*n^-b (3-param LSQ) from kscore-timeseries + backfill rows; replace _pairsSubScore's universal constant with the corpus curve; add forecast_pairs_to_target so cost-optimizer prices 'ingest-more' against the actual marginal pairs and flags diminishing returns. Gate behind a min-points floor.

items.title: Online contextual-bandit update of cost-optimizer strategy priors (UPGRADE)
items.change: Per (tenant,namespace,strategy) running posterior over realized ΔK (compareAndDecide/flywheel already produce candidate vs base K); blend frozen prior with observed (shrinkage when n small); recommend by posterior-sampled ΔK-per-dollar. Frozen prior stays the n=0 cold-start default. Closes the 'never learns which strategy worked' loop.

items.title: Canary/shadow-eval window before EXECUTE in the deploy guardrail (UPGRADE)
items.change: Insert a canary stage between DEPLOY_PROPOSED and DEPLOY_EXECUTED: route a small live slice to the candidate (reuse the W777 router), record kscore/fallback outcomes, require the anytime-valid gate to confirm non-regression on LIVE traffic before EXECUTE. Turns the 48h passive timer into a monitored canary on the highest-blast-radius path.
items.depends_on: Anytime-valid A/B gate (mSPRT) for continuous monitoring (BUG)

items.title: Embedding failure clustering + teacher-closed corrective pairs (UPGRADE)
items.change: Cluster failing items by embedding similarity (reuse drift-detect path) instead of hash bucket; for [NEEDS_CANONICAL_ANSWER] scaffolds optionally invoke the threaded teacher to synthesize the fix pair (budget/opt-in gated). Closes the EVALUATE->fix->TRAIN leg without a human; eval gate catches bad fixes.

items.title: Promote toy stump-GBM meta-trainer to real worker-shell GBM (UPGRADE)
items.change: Implement the already-named apps/trainer/meta_xgb.py (W786 worker-shell pattern): depth-3+ regularized GBM on rows.jsonl, write model + held-out RMSE so confidence is data-derived; quality-predictor learned path calls worker when available, falls back to JS stump. Pairs with conformal (GBM residuals feed calibration).
items.depends_on: Split-conformal prediction interval for predictKScore (UPGRADE)

items.title: Successive-halving (Hyperband/ASHA) candidate screening (FRONTIER)
items.change: When multiple plausible configs/recipes exist, run them as ASHA rungs (small-budget trials scored by existing eval, early-stop bottom half, full-compile only the survivor); reuse pairs_override + compareAndDecide. Payoff only once there are competing configs.
items.depends_on: Online contextual-bandit update of cost-optimizer strategy priors (UPGRADE)

items.title: Influence-based forward-only data valuation for ingest selection (FRONTIER)
items.change: Forward-only per-pair value (For-Value style: hidden-rep alignment + prediction error, one forward pass via the worker shell) to rank/prune ingest candidates; new 'select-high-value' optimizer strategy buys quality not volume. Heavier (needs GPU forward pass), research-stage at LLM scale — flag as the next data frontier after the cheaper gates land.
items.depends_on: Power-law learning-curve extrapolation for ingest budgeting (FRONTIER)

items.title: Request the nomic embedder for dedup/cluster instead of hardcoded ngram (BUG)
items.change: data-curate.js:203 hardcodes ['--embedder','ngram'] so the Node path NEVER asks for semantic dedup even when sentence-transformers is installed. Plumb an embedder choice (default 'auto'->nomic-embed-text-v1.5), rely on dedup_pairs.py's existing graceful ngram fallback; surface backend_used in the curate report. One-line capability that's silently disabled; lets the plan's curate DoD pass.

items.title: Model-free IFD/Superfiltering difficulty score for per-pair quality (FRONTIER)
items.change: workers/data/scripts/score_ifd.py computing IFD = ppl(answer|instruction)/ppl(answer) with the configured student (or gpt2 proxy on no-GPU); keep mid-high IFD band; wire as optional 'difficulty' signal in curatePairs, degrade to heuristic when torch absent (the _dedupViaPython pattern). Self-guided, needs NO teacher/embedder — best-fit frontier method; directly raises distill quality-per-pair.

items.title: Clustering-then-intra-cluster SemDeDup (scale past a few hundred pairs) (UPGRADE)
items.change: k-means pre-cluster the (already-computed) embeddings, run the greedy threshold pass only within each cluster (near-linear vs current O(n^2)); cluster assignments double as real semantic cluster_id (replacing the 3-gram-prefix bucket). Unblocks the 10K-pair curate smoke. (Coordinate with the studio SemDedup item.)
items.depends_on: Request the nomic embedder for dedup/cluster instead of hardcoded ngram (BUG)

items.title: DEITA complexity x quality x diversity selection stage (FRONTIER)
items.change: Add a SELECTION step to curatePairs (opts.target_size): rank by difficulty(IFD)*quality, greedily add highest-score while skipping pairs within cosine<diversity_tau of an already-selected one (reuse dedup embeddings); emit a selection report. 6K well-selected beats 60K random — directly lowers teacher spend AND raises K-Score.
items.depends_on: Model-free IFD/Superfiltering difficulty score for per-pair quality (FRONTIER)

items.title: Magpie template self-synthesis as a real AUGMENT generator (FRONTIER)
items.change: Magpie generation mode in AUGMENT + describe-engine upgrade gated behind KOLM_TEACHER_BASE_URL (replaces empty-output template stubs): feed pre-query template to self-synthesize N domain instructions, then collect responses; reuse previewCost gate; stamp provenance.strategy='magpie'; fall back to templates with no teacher. (Same method as the studio Magpie item — single implementation.)

items.title: Balance / distribution-skew analysis in CURATE (C2.4/C2.8) (GAP)
items.change: After clustering, compute max:median cluster ratio -> report.balance{worst_ratio,over_represented,under_represented}; when a production_histogram is passed (already available from active-learning.detectCoverageGaps) compute per-cluster train-vs-prod skew. Mostly wiring existing sibling code so the planned Data Health Balance bar is non-cosmetic.

items.title: Real grammar/completeness/relevance quality signals (C2.1) (GAP)
items.change: Extend the quality stage with relevance=tokenOverlap/embedding cosine(input,output), completeness=penalize truncated/mid-sentence/MAX_ROW_CHARS-boundary outputs; keep CoT/refusal; surface component breakdown so Data Health can explain WHY a pair scored low. The plan promised 5 components; only 2 ship.

items.title: DCLM/Nemotron learned quality classifier as optional CURATE filter (FRONTIER)
items.change: Optional workers/data/scripts/quality_classifier.py: bootstrap a fastText classifier from the user's curated-good vs filtered-bad split (or shipped seed), keep top fraction; degrade to heuristic when fasttext absent. Opt-in once IFD lands (cold-start labeling is a real UX cost).
items.depends_on: Model-free IFD/Superfiltering difficulty score for per-pair quality (FRONTIER)

items.title: Cleanlab-style label/answer-error detection (FRONTIER)
items.change: Outlier pass: flag answers disagreeing with cluster consensus + high-loss-low-IFD answers (likely noise) as a review queue (wire existing /v1/label-queue) rather than auto-dropping. Catches 4xx-captured-as-answer bad labels in log imports. False-positive-prone -> human-in-loop.
items.depends_on: Model-free IFD/Superfiltering difficulty score for per-pair quality (FRONTIER)

items.title: Domain-grounded personas + post-augment diversity check (UPGRADE)
items.change: Generic-persona rewrite reduces lexical diversity vs the seed. Derive personas from the namespace's cluster labels/production traffic OR prefer Magpie and demote persona to an explicitly-marked low-diversity strategy; add a distinct-n/embedding-spread diversity-delta so the user sees whether augment actually broadened coverage.

items.title: Provenance-aware data mixing/reweighting at TRAIN handoff (FRONTIER)
items.change: Cheap training-free reweighting: upsample under-represented clusters / cap over-represented toward a target (uniform-over-clusters or production-matched) using cluster_id + the balance report. Full DoReMi is overkill for SFT-scale; lowest priority.
items.depends_on: Balance / distribution-skew analysis in CURATE (C2.4/C2.8) (GAP)

items.title: Honor --json in the global error catch (dual-consumer envelope) (GAP)
items.change: main() global catch (~47525) always emits plain stderr text regardless of --json; detect --json/KOLM_OUTPUT=json and emit the existing jsonErrorEnvelope() (wired into only ~6 sites) with a stable KOLM_E_* code + suggested_fix/next[]. Agents/CI get clean JSON on success but unparseable text on failure today.

items.title: Wire rejectUnknownFlags across high-traffic verbs (BUG)
items.change: rejectUnknownFlags (sound, with 'did you mean') has exactly ONE caller (cmdCompute); a typo'd --jsno is silently dropped on ~150 verbs. Add a per-verb ALLOWED_FLAGS map called centrally from withErrorContext/_dispatchVerb; start with compile/run/distill/doctor/export/deploy/whoami/config; global flags always allowed.

items.title: Dynamic shell completion of artifact IDs/namespaces/enums (FRONTIER)
items.change: Hidden kolm __complete <line> printing live candidates; rewrite bash/zsh/fish emitters to delegate for arg positions (*.kolm after inspect/run/fix, --target export enum, --namespace known namespaces, recipe names); keep static fallback offline. Data already exists; thin shim.

items.title: Multi-step plan execution with per-step confirm (Warp Agent-mode) (FRONTIER)
items.change: kolm do --plan returns ordered steps[]{command,why,destructive}; print plan then execute [y/e/s/q] per step (auto-confirm read-only, always-prompt destructive); reuse classifyIntent; --yes for non-interactive, respect KOLM_NO_INTERACTIVE; single-shot cmdDo stays default.
items.depends_on: Honor --json in the global error catch (dual-consumer envelope) (GAP)

items.title: Grow errorHint into a contextual remediation registry (UPGRADE)
items.change: errorHint covers only 4 patterns; add ordered {matcher,hint,next[]} for network/timeout/402-plan-gate/429-rate-limit/missing-toolchain/CUDA-VRAM-OOM/ENOENT; feed the same next[] into jsonErrorEnvelope so human + agent get identical remediation. Reinforces the dual-consumer envelope.
items.depends_on: Honor --json in the global error catch (dual-consumer envelope) (GAP)

items.title: Passive update-notifier (UPGRADE)
items.change: Once-per-24h cached version check (timestamp in ~/.kolm) printing a boxed 'kolm X.Y available — run kolm update' on the NEXT run; unref'd fetch (no startup latency); gate on TTY + NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER + KOLM_NO_PROGRESS so CI/pipes stay silent. Reuse cmdUpgrade's 5s-timeout fetch.

items.title: kolm explain <KOLM_E_code> long-form error reference (UPGRADE)
items.change: ERROR_CODES map {code->{title,detail,fix,docs_url}}; kolm explain KOLM_E_... expands a code; include code in every human+JSON error + a 'run kolm explain <code>' breadcrumb; audit so every thrown error carries a code. Compounds with the dual-consumer envelope (same taxonomy).
items.depends_on: Honor --json in the global error catch (dual-consumer envelope) (GAP)

items.title: Self-healing doctor --fix beyond seed generation (UPGRADE)
items.change: A fixer per doctor check (mkdir ~/.kolm, write default config.toml, install completion, clear rejected token) keyed by check id; doctor --fix iterates auto-fixable checks, --dry-run previews exact commands, --yes applies; non-mechanical checks stay guidance only.

items.title: Remove orphaned cli/kolm-tui.mjs + unwired --cloud advert (BUG)
items.change: Delete the wave-122 legacy TUI (mockInfer stub + dead --cloud flag) OR fold any worthwhile UX into cmdTui and wire :run to real inference; remove the unwired --cloud advertisement; document so orphan-scan stops flagging it.

items.title: Multi-candidate / unique-prefix verb resolution (UPGRADE)
items.change: suggestVerb returns top 2-3 candidates within threshold (vs single guess) + unique-prefix acceptance (kolm comp->compile if unambiguous), gated so it never overrides an exact NL route; emit candidates in the JSON error next[].
items.depends_on: Honor --json in the global error catch (dual-consumer envelope) (GAP)

items.title: OAuth/PKCE + device-code login (FRONTIER)
items.change: kolm login --web (localhost callback + PKCE) with fallback to paste; kolm login --device (short code + verification URL) for SSH; keep paste-a-key default. Cross-surface (needs backend authorize+token endpoints) — sequence after CLI-only wins.

items.title: VHS .tape reproducible terminal demos (FRONTIER)
items.change: scripts/demos/*.tape for quickstart/compile/tui/doctor + make demos (or release-verify gate) re-recording GIFs so website transcripts match shipped behavior; bonus golden-file TUI regression. Requires ttyd+ffmpeg (dev-toolchain, not runtime).

items.title: Single source of truth for pricing tiers (BUG)
items.change: One canonical tiers structure rendering homepage #pricing, /pricing cards, /pricing editorial credit row, and JSON-LD offers. Fix: Free 1-vs-5 + Team 50-vs-250 contradictions (pick the number billing actually grants), add missing Pro $49 to homepage, set AggregateOffer offerCount=6, reconcile Custom/Enterprise. A noticed pricing contradiction kills trust in every other number.

items.title: Fix dead footer links /contact and /about site-wide (BUG)
items.change: Create thin public/contact.html + public/about.html (or do the planned /product->/about rename) OR repoint Contact->/book-demo and About->an existing page consistently across index/pricing/compare; extend the existing href-audit to footer links. High-intent compliance/procurement buyers click these.

items.title: Reconcile ROI calculator lede vs prefilled defaults (BUG)
items.change: Homepage ROI lede says '$3/$15 per million' but inputs are pin=0.25/pout=0.55; /pricing Enterprise payback hardcodes cost=5000 though the tier is 'Custom'. Align prose to defaults (or vice versa), hide/label the Custom payback figure; tiny test asserting lede string matches input defaults.

items.title: Replace compare.html hardcoded dark hex with theme tokens (BUG)
items.change: compare.html .cmp-card .when (background:#0c0e12) + market-update box render dark on the light-default site; swap to var(--ks-bg-2)/--surface-*/--ink-* tokens that flip per theme; verify both themes.

items.title: Surface social proof / case studies on the homepage (GAP, scoped down)
items.change: Add a post-hero trust block: tease the 3 existing case studies (their headline metrics as stat cards linking to /case-studies/*) + promote the hidden OSS-proof row (Apache-2.0/self-hostable/6 SDKs). REFUTED PART: do NOT promise named testimonials/logo wall — attributions are anonymized by explicit policy and there are no named customers. Impact medium, not critical.

items.title: Live free-chat playground in the hero (UPGRADE)
items.change: Wire kolm-chat.js to /v1/free/chat so 'Try it without signing up' runs a real prompt against a hosted specialist and shows the real receipt CID + latency; keep the race framing, make the right pane live (rate-limited, no-auth), fall back to the canned animation if unreachable. Needs an abuse/cost guardrail review.

items.title: Full-width final 'safety net' CTA band (UPGRADE)
items.change: Before the footer: one motivating line + primary /signup button + secondary book-a-demo (inline scheduling widget for Enterprise); visually distinct background. Page currently trails off into the footer.

items.title: Live GitHub-stars / OSS-traction signal near hero (GAP)
items.change: Build-time-fetched (cached) stars+forks badge for kolm-ai/kolm + Apache-2.0 chip + 6-SDKs chip + last-release freshness; only show real numbers — if stars are low lead with license/self-host/SDK breadth. Vendor-lock-in avoidance is the headline thesis.

items.title: Show real product UI in the hero right column (UPGRADE)
items.change: Pull the studio compile-loop UI / a real signed-receipt artifact card / the live chat widget into the hero (currently text-only; nearest UI is ~250 lines down). 2026 norm is 'show the product'.
items.depends_on: Live free-chat playground in the hero (UPGRADE)

items.title: Mobile-first pricing layout (UPGRADE)
items.change: Audit .pr-tiers at mobile breakpoints; stack to single column (recommended tier first), collapse long feature lists into 'compare all features', no horizontal scroll; default annual toggle (if billing supports). 58% of pricing traffic is mobile. Verify breakpoints first (confidence 0.6).

items.title: Link compare.html from the homepage (FRONTIER, surfacing)
items.change: compare.html is already a frontier-grade candid comparison (wrong-fit cards, competitor credit, dated posture) — add a 'How we compare' homepage entry near pricing/trust; reuse the dated-posture+wrong-fit pattern as a site convention; do NOT rewrite. (Fix its hardcoded-hex separately.)

items.title: Extend AI-readable docs (llms-full.txt + Ask + /api playground) — do NOT migrate to Mintlify (FRONTIER)
items.change: kolm is ahead on AI-readiness (llms.txt + ai-context.json shipped). Add llms-full.txt at build time, an 'Ask the docs' assistant on /docs+/api wired to free-chat scoped to the docs corpus, and an interactive 'try this endpoint' on /api using the existing openapi.json. Incremental, reuses assets.

open_questions: Team compile-credit count is 50 (cards) vs 250 (editorial) and Free is 1 vs 5 — which does the billing backend actually grant? Needed to fix the pricing single-source-of-truth.

Is the no-code Compile wizard expected to drive a real hosted GPU job now, or stay an explicit 'preview compile' until hosted training infra is funded? Determines whether the account-ui top finding is a 6-day integration or a 0.5-day copy fix.

Does kolm want a hosted, no-auth, rate-limited free-chat endpoint exposed from the public homepage (cost/abuse exposure), or keep the canned race? Gates the website playground + the create-model capture/live-chat findings.

Should new injection_classes / cache_hit / estimator_status / matched_rule_id fields go into the Ed25519-SIGNED canonical receipt (schema migration + verifier/SDK churn) or attach as non-signed top-level fields (cheaper, but weaker 'receipt is the proof')? This recurs across gateway, govern, and autopilot findings.
Confirm /about is a /product rename (not a net-new page) per MEMORY before creating public/about.html, to avoid a duplicate-surface.
Is the agent/MCP segment a near-term target? Gates the MCP gateway surface and the Warp-style multi-step plan executor.

Hosted Python/ONNX runtime: acceptable as a dependency for transformer NER (gateway) and IFD/quality-classifier (data-engine), or must everything stay zero-ML-dependency JS with the model paths opt-in only?
Which Rekor instance for live-receipt anchoring — kolm-operated, public-good Sigstore, or tenant-self-hosted by default? Affects the govern transparency-log finding's trust story.

Liger-kernel and GLiNER/Presidio/fastText/mergekit/TRL are heavy optional deps — confirm they belong in a [gpu]/optional extra (opt-in) rather than the base install, consistent with the existing honesty contract.
